purpose: UI + API integration tests forming regression pack

test_scenarios.title: Grant CRA consent with all disclosures displayed
test_scenarios.preconditions: User authenticated, no prior consent exists
steps_high_level: Verify consent screen shows data retrieved, CRA name, purpose, no marketing use
test_scenarios.expected_result: Consent recorded with timestamp, consent text version, customer ID; consent.granted event published

test_scenarios.title: Consent checkboxes are not pre-ticked
steps_high_level: Navigate to Credit Coach consent screen
test_scenarios.expected_result: All checkboxes are unchecked by default; user must actively opt-in

test_scenarios.title: Consent screen accessible via screen reader
steps_high_level: Verify all elements have ARIA labels
Verify content navigable via assistive technology
test_scenarios.expected_result: All consent elements announced correctly; focus order is logical

test_scenarios.title: Consent data encrypted at rest and in transit
steps_high_level: Verify database record encrypted with AES-256
test_scenarios.expected_result: Consent data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and transmitted via TLS 1.3

test_scenarios.title: Attempt consent grant without accepting all checkboxes
steps_high_level: Verify button is disabled or validation error shown
test_scenarios.expected_result: Consent cannot be submitted without all required checkboxes ticked

test_scenarios.title: Duplicate consent grant returns 409 Conflict
test_scenarios.preconditions: User already has active EXPERIAN consent
steps_high_level: Attempt to grant consent again for EXPERIAN
test_scenarios.expected_result: 409 Conflict returned; no duplicate consent record created

test_scenarios.title: Withdraw CRA consent independently per provider
steps_high_level: Navigate to Settings > Credit Coach > Manage Consent
Verify consent status is WITHDRAWN with timestamp
test_scenarios.expected_result: Consent withdrawn; CRA retrieval stops; consent record marked withdrawn (not deleted)

test_scenarios.title: Re-consent prompted when consent text version changes
test_scenarios.preconditions: User has active consent with version 1.0; consent text updated to 1.1
steps_high_level: Verify re-consent screen displayed with updated text
Verify no data retrieved until re-consent granted
test_scenarios.expected_result: User prompted to re-consent before any data retrieval occurs

test_scenarios.title: Withdraw already-withdrawn consent returns 409
steps_high_level: Attempt to withdraw consent again via API
test_scenarios.expected_result: 409 Conflict; already withdrawn

test_scenarios.title: Consent management screen accessible via VoiceOver/TalkBack
test_scenarios.preconditions: User has active consent, assistive technology enabled
test_scenarios.expected_result: All elements accessible with logical focus order

test_scenarios.title: Design system components pass axe-core across all brands
steps_high_level: Render under Bank of Scotland theme
test_scenarios.expected_result: Zero axe-core violations across all three brand themes

test_scenarios.title: Contrast ratios maintained across brand themes
steps_high_level: Verify across Lloyds, Halifax, BoS palettes
test_scenarios.expected_result: All contrast ratios meet WCAG 2.1 AA across all brands

test_scenarios.title: Score visualisations use patterns in addition to colour
steps_high_level: View score gauge and factor indicators
Verify information conveyed via shape/pattern not colour alone
test_scenarios.expected_result: Colour-blind users can distinguish all visual elements via patterns/shapes

test_scenarios.title: Loading and error states communicated via ARIA live regions
test_scenarios.expected_result: Loading and error states announced to screen reader users

test_scenarios.title: Retrieve credit score via soft search after consent
steps_high_level: Verify score, band, and factors stored within 3 seconds
test_scenarios.expected_result: Score retrieved via soft search; no footprint on credit file; response within 3s

test_scenarios.title: Circuit breaker triggers on CRA timeout showing cached data
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA API unavailable; cached score exists
steps_high_level: Verify circuit breaker opens after 3 failures
Verify cached stale data shown with 'Last updated [date]' label
test_scenarios.expected_result: Stale cached data displayed with timestamp; X-Data-Stale header true

test_scenarios.title: Score retrieval without consent returns 404
steps_high_level: Verify 404 returned with message about consent required
test_scenarios.expected_result: 404 Not Found; no CRA call made without consent

test_scenarios.title: Data quality below 95% triggers re-fetch flag
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA returns data with quality score 94%
steps_high_level: Retrieve score with low quality data
Verify data flagged for re-fetch on next cycle
test_scenarios.expected_result: Data with quality < 95% rejected and flagged for re-fetch

test_scenarios.title: Data older than 30 days triggers re-fetch
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA returns data dated 31 days ago
test_scenarios.expected_result: Data older than 30 days rejected; re-fetch initiated

test_scenarios.title: TLS 1.3 enforced on all CRA data transmission
steps_high_level: Monitor network traffic during score retrieval
test_scenarios.expected_result: All inter-service communication uses TLS 1.3

test_scenarios.title: Display score with band and month-on-month change
steps_high_level: Verify score gauge shows current score
Verify month-on-month change with directional indicator
test_scenarios.expected_result: Dashboard shows score on gauge, band classification, and +/- change indicator

test_scenarios.title: First score retrieval shows no comparison message
test_scenarios.preconditions: First-time score retrieval; no previous score
steps_high_level: Verify change section shows 'First check — no comparison available'
test_scenarios.expected_result: No delta shown; friendly first-check message displayed

test_scenarios.title: Score dashboard accessible via screen reader
steps_high_level: Verify score value, band, and change direction announced
Verify accessible labels on gauge widget
test_scenarios.expected_result: Score announced as '[value] out of 1250, [band] band, [direction] [points] points'

test_scenarios.title: Score labelled with Experian scale (0-1250)
test_scenarios.expected_result: Score clearly labelled with provider and scale

test_scenarios.title: Thin file shows guidance message
steps_high_level: Verify dashboard shows thin file message with credit-building guidance
test_scenarios.expected_result: Message: 'We don't have enough data to generate a full score — here's how to build your credit history'

test_scenarios.title: CRA unavailable with no cache shows friendly error
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA unavailable; no cached data exists
test_scenarios.expected_result: Friendly error with retry option; no technical jargon

test_scenarios.title: PII not leaked in API responses or logs
steps_high_level: Verify API responses don't leak data to unauthorised sessions
test_scenarios.expected_result: No PII in logs; no data leakage across sessions

test_scenarios.title: Display score factors in plain English ordered by impact
steps_high_level: Verify up to 5 positive and 5 negative factors shown
test_scenarios.expected_result: Factors displayed with category, impact direction, and plain language explanation

test_scenarios.title: Unknown factor code shows fallback message
steps_high_level: Verify raw factor shown with 'Contact us for explanation' fallback
test_scenarios.expected_result: Graceful fallback for unmapped factor codes

test_scenarios.title: Factors accessible via screen reader in logical order
steps_high_level: Verify each factor's category, direction, and explanation announced
test_scenarios.expected_result: Factors announced in correct order with full context

test_scenarios.title: See all factors expands full list
test_scenarios.preconditions: More than 5 positive or negative factors exist
steps_high_level: Verify same formatting and ordering by impact
test_scenarios.expected_result: Full factor list displayed ordered by impact with consistent formatting

test_scenarios.title: See all expansion announced to screen reader
test_scenarios.preconditions: Screen reader active; factors section visible
test_scenarios.expected_result: Expansion announced; new factors accessible

test_scenarios.title: Score change explanation shows contributing factors
steps_high_level: Verify previous score, new score, delta shown
Verify ranked list of changed factors with details
test_scenarios.expected_result: Change explanation with specific factor details (e.g. 'Credit utilisation increased from 45% to 62%')

test_scenarios.title: Score drop uses empathetic tone with actionable next step
steps_high_level: View change explanation for score drop
test_scenarios.expected_result: Empathetic messaging with constructive suggestion; no panic-inducing language

test_scenarios.title: Score unchanged shows stability reassurance message
test_scenarios.expected_result: 'Your score is stable — keep up the good work' message displayed

test_scenarios.title: Score increase shows positive reinforcement
steps_high_level: View change explanation for score increase
test_scenarios.expected_result: Congratulatory/positive messaging for score improvement

test_scenarios.title: Change explanation accessible via screen reader
test_scenarios.preconditions: Change explanation displayed; screen reader active
steps_high_level: Verify delta direction and contributing factors announced
test_scenarios.expected_result: All change details announced accessibly

test_scenarios.title: Score history API returns time-series data within 1 second
test_scenarios.expected_result: Score history returned with score, band, date per data point within 1s

test_scenarios.title: Score history respects 24-month maximum retention
steps_high_level: Verify validation error or capped response
test_scenarios.expected_result: Maximum 24 months returned per retention policy

test_scenarios.title: Score history encrypted at rest with AES-256
test_scenarios.preconditions: Score history stored in Cloud SQL
steps_high_level: Confirm AES-256 with CMEK via Cloud KMS
test_scenarios.expected_result: All score history data encrypted at rest

test_scenarios.title: Conversational query 'What is my credit score?' returns score
test_scenarios.preconditions: User has active consent and retrieved score
steps_high_level: Type 'What is my credit score?' in chat
Verify conversational response with current score, band, and last refresh date
test_scenarios.expected_result: Agent responds with score, band, and refresh date in conversational format

test_scenarios.title: Conversational query 'Why did my score change?' returns explanation
test_scenarios.preconditions: Score has changed since last refresh
steps_high_level: Type 'Why did my score change?' in chat
Verify response includes change explanation with contributing factors
test_scenarios.expected_result: Conversational explanation of score change with factors

test_scenarios.title: Unsupported query returns graceful handoff message
steps_high_level: Verify agent responds with scope explanation and handoff offer
test_scenarios.expected_result: 'I can help with credit score, factors, and improvement tips. For other queries, I'll connect you with the right assistant'

test_scenarios.title: Conversational response accessible via assistive technology
test_scenarios.preconditions: Screen reader active; conversation in progress
steps_high_level: Verify response announced via live region
Verify send button has accessible label
test_scenarios.expected_result: Chat messages announced; send button labelled 'Send message'

test_scenarios.title: Ambiguous query triggers clarifying question
steps_high_level: Verify agent asks clarifying question before routing
test_scenarios.expected_result: Agent asks 'Would you like to know about your credit score or your spending?'

test_scenarios.title: Offensive input deflected gracefully
test_scenarios.expected_result: Input deflected gracefully; no processing of harmful content

test_scenarios.title: CRA unavailable during conversation informs user
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA unavailable; user asks about score in chat
steps_high_level: Type 'What is my score?' while CRA down
Verify agent informs user and offers retry
test_scenarios.expected_result: Agent explains unavailability and offers to check back later

test_scenarios.title: Monthly batch refresh processes all enrolled customers
test_scenarios.preconditions: Multiple customers enrolled with active consent
steps_high_level: Verify requests staggered to respect CRA rate limits
test_scenarios.expected_result: All enrolled customers refreshed within batch window; rate limits respected

test_scenarios.title: Failed refresh retries with exponential backoff
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA returns error for specific customer
steps_high_level: Verify retry with exponential backoff up to 3 attempts
Verify marked as failed after 3 failures
test_scenarios.expected_result: 3 retries with exponential backoff; marked failed after exhaustion

test_scenarios.title: Score change emits Pub/Sub event
steps_high_level: Verify score.changed event published to Pub/Sub within 1 second
test_scenarios.expected_result: score.changed event published with correct payload

test_scenarios.title: Admin can configure refresh frequency
steps_high_level: Verify change takes effect on next batch
test_scenarios.expected_result: Frequency updated; change effective on next cycle; audit log recorded

test_scenarios.title: Refresh frequency enforces min/max boundaries
steps_high_level: Attempt to set frequency below 7 days
Attempt to set frequency above 90 days
test_scenarios.expected_result: Frequency constrained between 7-90 days; boundary violations rejected

test_scenarios.title: Non-admin user cannot access refresh config
test_scenarios.expected_result: 403 Forbidden; admin endpoints protected by role

test_scenarios.title: On-demand refresh rate limited to 1 per 24hr
test_scenarios.preconditions: User already refreshed within last 24 hours
test_scenarios.expected_result: 429 Too Many Requests; Retry-After header indicates wait time

test_scenarios.title: CRA unavailable shows cached score with refresh button
steps_high_level: Verify cached score shown with 'Last updated [date]' label
test_scenarios.expected_result: Cached score displayed with stale indicator and refresh option

test_scenarios.title: No cache and CRA unavailable shows retry message
steps_high_level: Verify message: 'We couldn't retrieve your score right now. Please try again later.'
test_scenarios.expected_result: Friendly error with retry button; no technical details exposed

test_scenarios.title: Partial CRA response shows score without factors
test_scenarios.preconditions: CRA returns score but no factors
steps_high_level: Verify factors section shows 'Factor details temporarily unavailable'
test_scenarios.expected_result: Score shown; factors section gracefully degraded

test_scenarios.title: Circuit breaker informs user of wait time
steps_high_level: Attempt refresh while circuit breaker open
Verify user informed of approximate wait time
test_scenarios.expected_result: User sees wait time estimate; system waits for reset period

test_scenarios.title: JWT missing returns 401 Unauthorized
steps_high_level: Call any protected endpoint without JWT
test_scenarios.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized; no data exposed

test_scenarios.title: Invalid JWT returns 401 Unauthorized
test_scenarios.expected_result: 401 for both expired and malformed tokens

test_scenarios.title: Touch targets meet 48dp minimum size
test_scenarios.expected_result: All touch targets >= 48dp; text respects system font scale

test_scenarios.title: Orchestrator routes credit query to Credit Coach agent within 500ms
test_scenarios.preconditions: Credit Coach agent registered on Envoy platform
steps_high_level: Verify routing to Credit Coach agent
test_scenarios.expected_result: Query routed to Credit Coach within 500ms

test_scenarios.title: Non-credit query not routed to Credit Coach
steps_high_level: Send non-credit query (e.g. 'What did I spend on groceries?')
Verify NOT routed to Credit Coach
test_scenarios.expected_result: Non-credit queries routed to appropriate agent (e.g. Spending Agent)

test_scenarios.title: Agent unavailability triggers circuit breaker with graceful error
steps_high_level: Send credit query while agent unavailable
Verify graceful error returned within 2 seconds
test_scenarios.expected_result: Graceful error message returned to orchestrator within 2s

test_scenarios.title: Intent classification routes credit queries with >95% accuracy
test_scenarios.expected_result: Credit queries classified and routed with >95% accuracy

test_scenarios.title: Ambiguous query triggers clarification before routing
steps_high_level: Verify clarifying question asked before routing
test_scenarios.expected_result: Clarifying question asked; no premature routing

test_scenarios.title: Rate limiting rejects excessive score refresh requests
test_scenarios.preconditions: Customer authenticated, consent granted, score already retrieved
steps_high_level: Immediately call refresh again within 24 hours
test_scenarios.expected_result: Second refresh within 24hr returns 429 Too Many Requests with Retry-After header indicating seconds until next allowed refresh

test_scenarios.title: Focus order follows logical reading sequence on dashboard
test_scenarios.preconditions: Customer on credit score dashboard with score displayed
steps_high_level: Tab through all interactive elements on dashboard
Verify focus moves: score card → factors section → action buttons → bottom nav
Verify no focus traps or skipped elements
test_scenarios.expected_result: Focus order follows visual layout top-to-bottom, left-to-right. All interactive elements reachable via keyboard. No focus traps.

test_scenarios.title: Score display handles score unchanged between refreshes
test_scenarios.preconditions: Customer has score 742 from previous month, new refresh returns same 742
steps_high_level: Navigate to dashboard after monthly refresh
Verify score shows 742 with 'No change since last month' message
Verify change explanation section shows 'Your score is stable' message
test_scenarios.expected_result: Dashboard shows score 742, change indicator shows '— No change', positive reassurance message displayed. No error state.

test_scenarios.title: Score change explanation handles first-ever score (no previous)
test_scenarios.preconditions: Customer just granted consent, first score retrieved, no previous score exists
steps_high_level: Navigate to dashboard after first score retrieval
Verify change section shows 'This is your starting point' (not an error)
test_scenarios.expected_result: Change explanation section shows 'This is your starting point' message. No comparison data. No error.

test_scenarios.title: Expand all factors via See All link
test_scenarios.preconditions: Customer on dashboard with 4 factors shown in summary
steps_high_level: Tap 'See all →' link in factors section
Verify navigation to full factors screen
Verify all positive and negative factors displayed with descriptions
test_scenarios.expected_result: Full factors screen shows all factors grouped by positive/negative with detailed plain English descriptions and weighting percentages

test_scenarios.title: Consent grant records GDPR-compliant audit trail
test_scenarios.preconditions: Customer on consent screen, all checkboxes checked
steps_high_level: Verify API response includes consentId and grantedAt timestamp
Verify record contains: consentTextVersion, consentTextHash, channel, status=GRANTED
Verify consent.granted event published to Pub/Sub
test_scenarios.expected_result: Immutable consent record created per UK GDPR Art. 7(1) with full audit trail. Event published for downstream processing.

test_scenarios.title: Score displayed in GBP context with correct Experian scale
steps_high_level: Verify score shows '742' with scale indicator 'out of 1,250'
Verify any monetary values use £ symbol
test_scenarios.expected_result: Score displayed on Experian 0-1250 scale. Band classification correct. Any financial context uses £ (GBP).

feature_files.content:
@epic-EP01 @regression
Feature: CRA Consent Grant
  As a retail banking customer
  I want to provide explicit consent before my credit data is retrieved
  So that I understand what data is accessed and how it will be used

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as "John Smith" with NI "QQ123456C"
    And I have no prior CRA consent

  @story-US003 @critical @smoke
  Scenario: Grant consent for Experian with all disclosures
    When I navigate to the Credit Coach
    Then I see the consent screen with transparency disclosures
    And the disclosures include "data retrieved", "Experian", "coaching only", "no marketing"
    And no checkboxes are pre-ticked
    When I tick all consent checkboxes
    And I tap "Agree & Check My Score"
    Then the consent API returns status 201
    And the consent record includes timestamp and consent text version "1.0"
    And a "consent.granted" event is published

  @story-US003 @high
  Scenario: Cannot submit consent without all checkboxes
    When I navigate to the Credit Coach
    And I tick only the first two checkboxes
    Then the "Agree & Check My Score" button is disabled

  @story-US003 @high
  Scenario: Duplicate consent returns 409 Conflict
    Given I already have active EXPERIAN consent
    When I attempt to grant EXPERIAN consent again
    Then the consent API returns status 409
    And the error message indicates active consent already exists

  @story-US003 @high @accessibility
  Scenario: Consent screen is fully accessible
    When I navigate to the Credit Coach
    Then all checkboxes have associated ARIA labels
    And the focus order follows top-to-bottom logical sequence
    And the page passes axe-core accessibility checks

@epic-EP01 @regression
Feature: CRA Consent Withdrawal
  As a retail banking customer
  I want to withdraw my CRA consent at any time
  So that my data is no longer retrieved

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as "John Smith" with NI "QQ123456C"
    And I have active EXPERIAN consent

  @story-US004 @critical @smoke
  Scenario: Withdraw consent stops CRA retrieval
    When I navigate to Settings > Credit Coach > Manage Consent
    And I tap "Withdraw Consent"
    And I confirm the withdrawal with reason "customer_request"
    Then the withdrawal API returns status 200
    And the consent status is "WITHDRAWN" with withdrawnAt timestamp
    And a "consent.revoked" event is published
    When I navigate to the Credit Coach dashboard
    Then the consent screen is displayed again

  @story-US004 @high
  Scenario: Re-consent prompted on consent text version change
    Given the consent text version has been updated to "1.1"
    When I access the Credit Coach
    Then I am prompted to re-consent with the updated text
    And no data is retrieved until I re-consent

  @story-US004 @medium
  Scenario: Withdraw already-withdrawn consent returns 409
    Given my consent has already been withdrawn
    When I attempt to withdraw consent again
    Then the API returns status 409
    And the error indicates consent already withdrawn

@epic-EP02 @regression
Feature: Credit Score Retrieval via Soft Search
  As a retail banking customer
  I want my credit score retrieved without leaving a footprint
  So that monitoring does not harm my creditworthiness

  Background:
    Given I am authenticated as "Jane Doe" with NI "AB123456D"
    And I have active EXPERIAN consent

  @story-US008 @critical @smoke
  Scenario: Retrieve score within 3 seconds
    When I navigate to the Credit Coach dashboard
    Then the score is retrieved via soft search
    And the response is received within 3 seconds
    And the score, band, and factors are stored

  @story-US008 @critical @smoke
  Scenario: Circuit breaker shows cached data on CRA timeout
    Given the CRA API is configured to timeout after 2.5 seconds
    And a cached score of 727 exists
    When I navigate to the Credit Coach dashboard
    Then the cached score 727 is displayed
    And the response header "X-Data-Stale" is "true"
    And a "Last updated" timestamp is shown

  @story-US008 @critical
  Scenario: No consent returns 404
    Given I have no active CRA consent
    When I request my credit score via API
    Then the API returns status 404
    And the error indicates consent is required

  @story-US008 @high
  Scenario: On-demand refresh rate limited to once per 24 hours
    Given I have already refreshed my score today
    When I attempt another on-demand refresh
    Then the API returns status 429
    And the "Retry-After" header indicates remaining wait time

    And my current score is 742 with previous score 727

  @story-US009 @critical @smoke
  Scenario: Display score with band and change indicator
    When I view the Credit Coach dashboard
    Then I see my score "742" on the gauge widget
    And I see the band "Good (700-849)"
    And I see the change "+15 points since last month"
    And the score is labelled "Experian score (0-1250)"

    When I view the Credit Coach dashboard
    Then the change section shows "First check — no comparison available"
